title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #6, Whitebeard Pirates, Toki, Unknown person #7 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OROCHI mentioned that OnigaShima's entrance is always in WWATER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So it'll be cold!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What does that mean?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The seasons aren't very consistent on the mainland, either...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be perfect for us if the climate is cold there, since we're covered in fur.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means that our biggest worry should be...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The weather conditions, rather than the climate itself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There'll definitely be a full moon that night, but if it is hidden behind the clouds, it won't be much use to us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! If all the minks are able to fight the way carrot did, it'd be a major advantage for our side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So whether we'll be able to use salong will depend on our luck...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Regardless, we need master nekomamushi and the guardians to make it back in time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's wrong, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom is here, but... Jinbe still hasn't come!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the reason we were able to escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: We'll wait for you at Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rear guard!! Please leave it to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't forget... JINBE!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: Am your captain now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You must come!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He took care of his loose ends so he could join us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm sure he'll be a welcome addition.

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: There's still time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If he's still alive, he'll come.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's definitely alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He'll come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The watching Hour Boy came last night!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There wasn't any news of a robbery in the capital though, was there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But look... there's money here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may not be able to participate in tomorrow's fire festival, but at least we'll be able to afford some water with this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mountain hideout of those bandits was burned to the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...So why would they continue to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You look like you know something about it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Steal food from our farm, instead of coming for revenge!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well? Start talking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No... I don't know anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whisper whisper

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe they are responsible for the miss- ing food?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the rumour about the nine red scabbards returning is true...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Beasts pirates headliner

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that is the case, we cannot give them away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What should we do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What are you lot mumbling about!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will show you the way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just do not lay another hand on these people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: O... O-TSURU!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SHOW ME!? So you know what happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will see if you follow me... Although, it will be a long journey...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: O-T SURU kin'emon's wife

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ki'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm'm

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must have gathered a lot of people to require all that food... King!.........................................you, you really must be

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Leave this to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will not allow them to thwart your plans!! Please return this country to the Kozuki clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TSURU!! There is no need to cover for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is right, you do not know need to worry about us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Getting enough food to eat our fill was a dream come true!! None of us would mind dying after that!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 55 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
